name: Datasette Lite
description: Datasette running entirely in your browser via WebAssembly (Pyodide). Upload SQLite databases or CSV files and explore them with a full SQL interface — no server, no account, and your data never leaves your device. Built on the popular Datasette data exploration framework by Simon Willison.
coreTask: Explore and query SQLite databases and CSV files directly in your browser using SQL, with no installation or account needed.
